heading: Depository for agreements between States
label: 2113 Depository for agreements between States
text: The Archivist may receive duplicate originals or authenticated copies of agreements or compacts entered into under the Constitution and laws of the United States, between States of the Union, and take necessary actions for their preservation and servicing.
